summary: FASE 1 Villa Paris testing complete. All backend APIs working (16/16 tests passed). Prisma schema operational after extension. Appuntamenti CRUD functional. PUT /api/eventi patch-safe verified. Audit logging working for CLIENT/EVENT/APPOINTMENT. UI flows tested: Calendario page, Appuntamenti page, double-click navigation, appuntamento creation from calendario, and 'Crea evento da appuntamento' prefill.
seed_data_creation: Test appuntamenti created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: FASE 1 implementation verified. Focus areas tested: /api/appuntamenti CRUD, /api/eventi PUT patch-safe, /api/clienti isSpam support, /api/audit logging. UI pages: /calendario (with appuntamento filter and quick create modal), /appuntamenti (list/detail/edit), /nuovo-evento (prefill from appuntamento). Double-click navigation from calendario to appuntamenti works.

prisma_schema_operational.details: GET /api/eventi returns data correctly after schema extension with new entities

api_appuntamenti_post.details: POST creates appuntamento with auto-generated cliente, returns statsCliente

api_appuntamenti_get.details: GET list and GET by id both work, include statsCliente with totaleAppuntamenti and tempoTotaleDedicatoMin

api_appuntamenti_put_patch_safe.details: PUT updates only provided fields, preserves others (noteColloquio, riassuntoColloquio)

calendario_appuntamento_creation.details: Click on empty date opens quick appointment modal, saves via /api/appuntamenti, shows in calendar

calendario_double_click_navigation.details: Double-click on appuntamento in calendar navigates to /appuntamenti?id=X

appuntamenti_page_load_and_detail.details: Page loads appuntamenti list, clicking item shows detail with cliente KPI, progressivo, stato opzione

appuntamenti_page_edit_and_save.details: Modifying esito, riassuntoColloquio and saving works correctly

put_eventi_patch_safe.details: Updating only 'stato' on evento does NOT clear titolo/tipo/fascia fields

clienti_spam_support.details: POST and PUT /api/clienti support isSpam/spamReason/spamMarkedAt fields

audit_api_logging.details: GET /api/audit returns logs, supports entityType filter (CLIENT/EVENT/APPOINTMENT)

nuovo_evento_prefill_from_appuntamento.details: /nuovo-evento?appuntamentoId=X prefills cliente data from appuntamento (nome, email)

date_opzionate_support.details: Appuntamenti support dateOpzionate array, statoOpzione computed correctly

ui_verification.calendario_page: Loads correctly, shows events with color coding, filter buttons (Tutti/Confermati/Opzionati/Appuntamenti) work, year navigation, quick appointment modal
ui_verification.appuntamenti_page: List/detail layout, quick create form, KPI boxes (cliente/progressivo), date opzionate section, save/convert/delete buttons
ui_verification.nuovo_evento_page: Canale selection, cliente1/cliente2 forms, event data form, menu selection, date selection calendar
